mentions_legales.label: Adresse de courrier électronique
mentions_legales.quote: Please contact us at **[email protected]** if you have any complaints, questions, comments, or concerns with respect to your privacy or this policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Présence d'une politique de confidentialité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: This Mattermost, Inc. ("Mattermost" or "we" or "us" or "our") privacy policy (the "Privacy Policy") is designed to help you understand what information we collect and how we use or share that information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We collect personal information that you provide when you send us a message through our Sites, register for or create an account with the Sites, or request more information from us. This information includes your name, email address, phone number, other contact details, and other information you choose to provide us.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: To the extent that our processing of the information you provide is subject to the EU General Data Protection Regulation or its UK equivalent (together the “GDPR”), the legal bases for this processing include GDPR Art. 6(1)(b) (performance of a contract) and GDPR Art. 6(1)(f) (legitimate interests).

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Please be aware that some of the information described below is required to offer the Sites and Services, and if this information is not provided, we may not be able to provide the Sites and Services.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We retain the personal information we collect for as long as we need to provide our Sites and/or Services, or as required to comply with our legal obligations. After such time, we will delete, de-identify, or aggregate this information within 60 days, unless otherwise required by law.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may share information about website visitors, Customers, end users of the Services, and Mattermost Community and forum participants with other entities for specific purposes. This sharing may include: With service providers/processors, subcontractors, partners, vendors, consultants, and others that help us with any of the purposes in this Privacy Policy

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We implement a variety of security measures aimed at maintaining the safety of the personal information we collect from loss, misuse, and unauthorized access or disclosure.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: In addition to the above-listed rights, you may also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: to obtain the rectification of any inaccurate personal information stored by us or completion of such information;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: to request information regarding the processing of your personal information by us;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: to obtain the erasure of your personal information stored by us;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: to obtain the restriction of processing of your personal information;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: to receive your personal information that you have provided to us in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format or to demand transmission to another controller;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: to withdraw your consent once given to us at any time.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: Please read our **Cookies Policy** for more details.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We use this technical information for various purposes, including to protect from potential security attacks and abuse.

cookies.label: Détail des finalités (2e niveau)
cookies.quote: We may also use this type of information to verify accounts and activity, and to detect, investigate, prevent, and respond to potential or actual security incidents and other malicious, deceptive, fraudulent, or illegal activity.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: we may send cookies to your computer or device that allow us to uniquely identify your browser, computer, or device. We (and other entities) may use cookies (and similar technologies) to collect other technical information when you use or visit the Sites and Services, such as Internet Protocol (IP) address, location, browser type and settings, date and time the Sites and Services were used

cookies.label: Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We use Google Analytics and other third-party services to improve the performance of the Sites and for analytics and marketing purposes.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: the personal information we collect may be transferred or accessed in various countries, including the United States of America.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: This information includes your name, email address, phone number, other contact details, and other information you choose to provide us.
identite.purpose: Communication, account management, and provision of services.

contact.quote: This information includes your name, email address, phone number, other contact details, and other information you choose to provide us.
contact.purpose: Communication, account management, and provision of services.

compte_auth.quote: register for or create an account with the Sites, or request more information from us
compte_auth.purpose: Account creation, authentication, and access to services.

paiement.quote: billing details (such as payment information and billing addresses)
paiement.purpose: Processing payments and billing for services.

localisation.quote: location, browser type and settings, date and time the Sites were used, the web page that you were visiting before accessing our Sites, information about your activities on the Sites, external links and the features or content which you accessed from our Sites. When you access the Sites with a device (including a mobile device), we may also collect and store a unique identifier associated with your device and additional information about the device, including user settings, location, operating system of the device, and crash settings.

appareil_technique.quote: Internet Protocol (IP) address, location, browser type and settings, date and time the Sites were used, the web page that you were visiting before accessing our Sites, information about your activities on the Sites, external links and the features or content which you accessed from our Sites. When you access the Sites with a device (including a mobile device), we may also collect and store a unique identifier associated with your device and additional information about the device, including user settings, location, operating system of the device, and crash settings.

usage_comportement.quote: team and channel memberships, system preferences, features they use, content and links they interact with, the types of files shared and what third party services are used (if any). We may also collect information end users voluntarily provide to us through the Services, such as survey responses.
usage_comportement.purpose: Improving services, personalization, and performance analysis.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: message preview snippets (which may include personal information shared by end users in messages, if the Customer enables the ability to display message preview snippets for the HPNS relay)
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Providing push notifications and improving services.

donnees_tiers.quote: We may also combine the information we collect about you with information we obtain from third parties.

mineurs.quote: We do not knowingly sell, share, or process for interest-based advertising the personal information of minors under 16 years of age.

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, compte_auth, paiement, usage_comportement, appareil_technique, localisation, contenus_utilisateur
legal_bases.quote: To the extent that our processing of the information you provide is subject to the GDPR, the legal bases for this processing include GDPR Art. 6(1)(b) (performance of a contract)

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, compte_auth, paiement, usage_comportement, appareil_technique, localisation, contenus_utilisateur, donnees_tiers
legal_bases.quote: To the extent that our processing of technical information is subject to the GDPR, the legal basis for such processing is GDPR Art. 6(1)(f) (legitimate interests).

transfers.quote: In order for us to operate and provide our Sites and Services globally, the personal information we collect may be transferred or accessed in various countries, including the United States of America.
